summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 21 city-specific landing pages for SEO/GEO purposes. All major functionality working correctly including unique content, navigation, forms, and JSON-LD schema.
passed_tests: Service areas index page renders with all 21 city cards
City card links navigate to correct /service-areas/:citySlug URLs
Minneapolis page renders with unique headline 'Minneapolis IT Support That Moves at Your Speed'
Edina page renders with unique headline 'Edina's Businesses Expect Excellence — So Does Our IT'
Shakopee page renders with unique headline 'Shakopee IT Services for a City That's Booming'
Each city page displays unique local industries (5 per city tested)
Each city page displays unique neighborhoods/areas tags (5 per city tested)
Local Challenge and Did You Know sections display city-specific content
Contact form submission shows success message
We also serve section displays links to other 20 cities
Home navigation links work correctly from city pages
Footer Service Areas link navigates to /service-areas from homepage
JSON-LD LocalBusiness schema present with city-specific geo coordinates
All CTA buttons are clickable and functional
Testimonials section displays 3 curated testimonials per city
Services section displays 4 service cards with city-specific descriptions
